title: Irukaanna Iduppirukaana Ilaiyaana Lyrics Nanban Songs lyrics
singerName: Javed Ali, Sunidhi Chauhan, Vijay Prakash
stanzas:
Singer: Viijay Prakash, Javed Ali, Sunidhi Chauhan
Song: Irukaanna Iduppirukaana
 Movie: Nanban
Music : Harris Jeyaraj
Lyrics : Pa VIjay

Labakku Raani Labakku Raani ..
kalappiyaane kalappiyaane ...

Irukkaana idupirukkaana Illaiyaanaa illieana ?
Un idai thaana inbakk kadaithaana
mellidai thaandi udaithaana !!!

ada ikkani mukkani mugadu
naan thuthaanaaga thagadu
un udhattukul ethaanai udhadu
onnu koduk kodu

Adi anjagam anjagam mayilu
nee kanjanjanga rail-u
un iduppe aaraam viralu, ne gilu gilu..

Olli belly jelly belly malli
vaasam malli un maeni vengala velli
Solli solli unna alli killi
kannam killi vizhayaada vandhavan gilli...

Olli belly jelly belly malli
vaasam malli en maeni vengala velli
Solli solli enna alli killi
kannam killi vizhayaada vandhavan gilli...

Oruvaati idupaadi
malai yerakkathula thalla
Edangaati padangaati
enna arakka paraaka vandhu kolla

Adangaati madangaati
vaai oraikka oraikka muththam vaiyaen
Padangaati bayangaati
nenju yeraika yeraika thappu seiyyen

Naan chinna payyan ..ayya
Nee kanna vaiyyaen ..ayya
nee sonna seiven-- vaa vaa vayyen...

Olli belly jelly belly malli
vaasam malli un maeni vengala velli
Solli solli enna alli killi
kannam killi vizhayaada vandhavan gilli...

Laichaana laichaana
idha lavanga lavanga kadichaana
Inichaana inichaana
vaai manalil kadalil thinichaana

Molukkaana molukkaana
nalla pazhuthu pazhuthu thalukkaana
Idaichaana kolzhchaana
romba sedhukki sedhuki olachaana

Nee cheekishthaana !!, ini un kiss thaana ?
naan mangose thaana !!, un kaiyil kazhakasthaana

Labakku Raani Labakku Raani kumbathu maganee
kalappiyaane kalappiyaane rakshalube be

Irukkaana idupirukkaana Illaiyaanaa illieana ?
Un idai thaana inbakk kadaithaana
mellidai thaandi udaithaana !!!

ada ikkani mukkani mugadu
naan thuthaanaaga thagadu
un udhattukul ethaanai udhadu
onnu koduk kodu

Adi anjagam anjagam mayilu
nee kanjanjanga rail-u
un iduppe aaraam viralu, ne gilu gilu..

Olli belly jelly belly malli
vaasam malli un maeni vengala velli
Solli solli enna alli killi
kannam killi vizhayaada vandhavan gilli...

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of Irukaanna Iduppirukaana?

The song is a lively and romantic track that combines energetic beats with playful lyrics.

Who are the singers of this song?

Javed Ali, Sunidhi Chauhan, and Vijay Prakash lend their voices to this vibrant number.

What is the context of the song in the movie Nanban?

The song appears during a fun and celebratory moment, highlighting the camaraderie and joy among the characters.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music was composed by the talented Harris Jeyaraj.

When was the song released?

The song was released in the year 2011.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Irukaanna Iduppirukaana from the movie Nanban is a vibrant and romantic track that captures the essence of youthful exuberance and celebration. Sung by Javed Ali, Sunidhi Chauhan, and Vijay Prakash, the song features playful lyrics by Pa Vijay and energetic music by Harris Jeyaraj. It is set during a lively moment in the film, showcasing the joy and camaraderie among friends. The song's upbeat tempo and catchy tune make it perfect for parties and celebrations, evoking feelings of happiness and excitement.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Feel the vibrant energy of Irukaanna Iduppirukaana from the movie Nanban, where the dynamic trio of Javed Ali, Sunidhi Chauhan, and Vijay Prakash bring Harris Jeyaraj's peppy beats to life. This song is a perfect blend of romance and rhythm, making it a must-listen for every celebration. Dive into the lively world of Nanban with this unforgettable track!
stanzaMeanings: Labakku Raani Labakku Raani .. mixed up, mixed up ...
Is it there or not? Did your waist bring happiness, did it break beyond the soft waist?
Oh, I was amazed by your lips, how many lips are there inside your lips? Give me one.
Oh, peacock-like girl, your waist is like a sixth finger, you are tickling me.
Olli belly jelly belly, jasmine fragrance, your body is like bronze and silver. Telling and telling, teasing and pinching, the one who came to play.
Olli belly jelly belly, jasmine fragrance, my body is like bronze and silver. Telling and telling, teasing and pinching, the one who came to play.
Once, while climbing the mountain, push me down. Come like a demon and attack me.
Don't be stubborn, don't be stubborn, kiss me once. Don't be afraid, don't be afraid, don't do wrong.
I'm a small boy, sir. You put me in your eyes, sir. I'll do what you say -- come, come, put me in.
Olli belly jelly belly, jasmine fragrance, your body is like bronze and silver. Telling and telling, teasing and pinching, the one who came to play.
Chewed like a clove, sweet like sugar, eaten in the sand and sea.
Ripened and ripened, very ripe, squeezed and squeezed, very pressed.
Are you cheeky? Is your kiss now? Am I like a mango? In your hand, am I like a fruit?
Labakku Raani Labakku Raani, son of the pot, mixed up, mixed up, rakshalube be
Is it there or not? Did your waist bring happiness, did it break beyond the soft waist?
Oh, I was amazed by your lips, how many lips are there inside your lips? Give me one.
Oh, peacock-like girl, your waist is like a sixth finger, you are tickling me.
Olli belly jelly belly, jasmine fragrance, your body is like bronze and silver. Telling and telling, teasing and pinching, the one who came to play.
